title: Manual arrange order for the automations for each border (and not by last created)
excerpt: once creating a board with many automations, I want to check the whole flow and see if I have all the automations I want, so I would like to manually arrange the order as I want the flow to see nothing is missed, and not…

posts.author: ofiravivi (ofir avivi)
posts.cookedHtml:
once creating a board with many automations, I want to check the whole flow and see if I have all the automations I want, so I would like to manually arrange the order as I want the flow to see nothing is missed, and not by last created like now
thanks

posts.author: neffy (Peter B)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed - this is a simple but necessary feature. When you have more than a screenful of automations - which isn’t hard given the font size of the list - you need to be able to order and group them (ie under headings/folders or something similar) for display purposes (not execution purposes, just display) to keep them organised, otherwise they quickly become an unorganised mess since the last edited seem to float to the top.

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree! This change in order by “last modified” is not very helpful… The ability to sort’em as we pleased, would be amazing. We need more users engaging in these topics.
